scripts.build:app: npm run build:helper:macos && npm run tauri -- build --config src-tauri/tauri.conf.json
scripts.lint: npm --prefix frontend run lint && cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets --all-features
scripts.format: npm --prefix frontend run format && cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.format:check: npm --prefix frontend run format:check && cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- --check
scripts.test: npm run test:scripts && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:rust
scripts.test:scripts: node --test scripts/tauri-dev-runner.test.mjs scripts/run-rust-tests.test.mjs scripts/run-swift-tests.test.mjs scripts/build-macos-helper.test.mjs scripts/tauri-config.test.mjs
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:app && npm run test:swift
